text.title: Graph RAG Indexing Pipeline Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use it when the input shape changes or before scaling a pilot.

decision-tree.root-question: Does this corpus need traversal beyond single-hop semantic similarity?

conclusion.verdict: Use vanilla vector RAG; do not build a graph.
Corpus too small for graph payoff; use vector RAG.

branch.when: traversal_needed == true AND doc_count >= 1000 AND idempotent_rerun_required == true

conclusion.verdict: Run full GraphRAG indexing with deterministic chunk_ids + checkpointing.

branch.when: traversal_needed == true AND doc_count >= 1000 AND idempotent_rerun_required == false

conclusion.verdict: Run GraphRAG but accept non-resumable indexing (one-shot).

example.trace: traversal_needed=true → doc_count=12480 → idempotent_rerun_required=true → full pipeline with deterministic chunk_ids + checkpoints.
